title: Suinezumi
description: Addon for the Cobblemon Mod adding 1 Fakemon
body:
Hi, i made this datapack long ago and just decided to upload it.

This cobblemon addon adds 1 fakemon inspired by my favorite movie, 
its type is water/ground and in terms of use i designed the moveset and stats to make it good at catching pokemons (false swipe at lvl 40 and sleep/paralyze moves,etc). 
You can find it in beaches/oceans/rivers as a common spawn

Please be kind this is my first creation that i learned Blockbench with.


You may include this addon in modpacks, but redistribution outside the Modrinth ecosystem is not permitted. Please link to this project’s Modrinth page for downloads.
